choices.name: AssistServicesReplacementkeysChoice
choices.choiceText: Assist Services to cover you for misfuel or replacement keys

rules.name: Mix_Fleet_with_Under_and_Over_3_5_Vehicles

rules.name: Mix_Fleet_MiniBus_Specialist_Fleetwide
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND ((7 AND 8 ) OR ( 9 AND 10 AND 11))
rules.label: Mix Fleet (MiniBus/Specialist/Fleetwide)

recordUpdates.name: Update_Check_all_vehicles_over_3_5_ton
recordUpdates.label: Update Check all vehicles over 3.5 ton

fields.name: AA_Info_Choice
fields.fieldText: I can provide you with a quote today. This is an indication of price only and will be valid for no more than 30 days. The information I’m going to give you about the AA Insurance Services will be limited, and I’ll send the full details out if you go ahead is that OK?

fields.name: breakdownCover
fields.fieldText: Do you currently have any breakdown cover?

fields.name: BusinessNature
fields.fieldText: What’s the nature of the business?

fields.name: PFU_TRUCK_API
fields.fieldText: Are all the vehicles 3.5 tonnes Gross Vehicle Weight or under?

fields.name: How_many_vehicles_over_3_5_tonnes_Gross_Weight
fields.fieldText: How many vehicles over 3.5 tonnes Gross Weight?

fields.name: MINI_BUS_API
fields.fieldText: Do any of your vehicles have more than 8 seats?

fields.name: How_many_vehicles_have_more_than_8_seat
fields.fieldText: How many vehicles have more than 8 seats?

fields.name: VEHICLE_USE_API
fields.fieldText: Are any of the vehicles classed as specialist vehicles, eg Taxis, Courriers ?

fields.name: Q1_ChoiceYES
fields.fieldText: Are any of the vehicle/s you want to cover currently in a breakdown situation?

fields.name: Q1_ChoiceYES_AAcover
fields.fieldText: We can still offer you service today. This will cost £98.75 plus VAT (£118.50), National Recovery will be charged at £1.99 + VAT (£2.39) per mile round trip. Do you want to go ahead on this basis? Do you currently have any breakdown cover?

fields.name: BCAS_YesText
fields.fieldText: Check BCAS to see if they have any existing AA cover

fields.name: Q1_ChoiceYES_AAcover_0
fields.fieldText: Are you authorised to represent your company today?

fields.name: Q4VehiclesToCover
fields.fieldText: How many vehicles are you looking to cover?

value.stringValue: Could you please confirm that this is the email where we can contact you regarding your policy?

fields.name: Q1_Authorizes_Marketing_Email
fields.fieldText: Are you happy for us to use your email address so we can keep you up to date about the latest deals on all our products, customer surveys plus the benefits of being an AA Member?

fields.name: National_Recovery
fields.fieldText:
National Recovery (Relay);

If your vehicle can’t be fixed at the roadside, would you like to be taken to a single destination of your choice anywhere in the UK, rather than the nearest suitable repairer?

fields.name: MIX_6_National_Recovery
fields.fieldText:
National Recovery (Relay);

If your vehicle can’t be fixed at the roadside, would you like to be taken to a single destination of your choice anywhere in the UK, rather than the nearest suitable repairer?

fields.name: National_Recovery_0
fields.fieldText:
National Recovery (Relay);

If your vehicle can’t be fixed at the roadside, would you like to be taken to a single destination of your choice anywhere in the UK, rather than the nearest suitable repairer?

fields.name: National_Recovery_0_0
fields.fieldText:
National Recovery (Relay);

If your vehicle can’t be fixed at the roadside, would you like to be taken to a single destination of your choice anywhere in the UK, rather than the nearest suitable repairer?

fields.name: DecisionQ3NoMessage
fields.fieldText: Cannot continue with call. Can you please give me a name and a contact of a person who is authorised.

fields.name: DecisionQ4NoMessage_0
fields.fieldText:
You can quote for a new membership but you cannot process a sale.

Please refer to the web site.

fields.name: MessageError_1
fields.fieldText:
Please check the number of vehicles entered.


You have a total number of vehicles higher than initially entered


Initial Total Vehicles : {!Q4VehiclesToCover}


Total vehicles inserted in the previous screen: {!Total_vehicles}


Vehicles over 3.5 ton: {!How_many_vehicles_over_3_5_tonnes_Gross_Weight}

Vehicles with more than 8 seats : {!How_many_vehicles_have_more_than_8_seat}

Specialist vehicles: {!How_many_specialist_vehicle}

fields.name: SpecialistCoverInformation
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCTION & NON ADVICE STATEMENT

I will ask you some questions to narrow down the level of cover which meets your needs and then you can then decide whether or not the cover is right for you.


INTRODUCING ROADSIDE ASSISTANCE

Our starting level cover Roadside Assistance provides you with assistance anywhere in the UK once your vehicle is ¼ mile away from your business address. If we can’t fix the vehicle on the roadside, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further.

fields.name: Fleetwide1Mssg
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Fleetwide 1.


ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

If your vehicle was off the road and you are unable to continue your journey, you can choose from a hire car for 48 hours, overnight accommodation or public transport costs to enable you to continue your journeys if your vehicle was off the road. The Hire vehicle is subject to the car hire company's terms which includes exclusions for endorsements.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable . A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

fields.name: Fleetwide1Mssg_0_0
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Fleetwide 1.


ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

If your vehicle was off the road and you are unable to continue your journey, you can choose from a hire car for 48 hours, overnight accommodation or public transport costs to enable you to continue your journeys if your vehicle was off the road. The Hire vehicle is subject to the car hire company's terms which includes exclusions for endorsements.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable . A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

fields.name: Fleetwide1Mssg_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Fleetwide 1.


ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

If your vehicle was off the road and you are unable to continue your journey, you can choose from a hire car for 48 hours, overnight accommodation or public transport costs to enable you to continue your journeys if your vehicle was off the road. The Hire vehicle is subject to the car hire company's terms which includes exclusions for endorsements.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable . A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Fleetwide 2


ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable. A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable. fields.name: FleetwideIntroMssg
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCTION & NON ADVICE STATEMENT

I will ask you some questions to narrow down the level of cover which meets your needs and then you can then decide whether or not the cover is right for you.


INTRODUCING ROADSIDE ASSISTANCE / FLEETWIDE

Our starting level cover Roadside Assistance provides you with assistance anywhere in the UK. If we can’t fix the vehicle on the roadside, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further.

fields.name: FleetwideIntroMssg_0
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCTION & NON ADVICE STATEMENT

I will ask you some questions to narrow down the level of cover which meets your needs and then you can then decide whether or not the cover is right for you.


INTRODUCING ROADSIDE ASSISTANCE / FLEETWIDE

Our starting level cover Roadside Assistance provides you with assistance anywhere in the UK. If we can’t fix the vehicle on the roadside, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further.

fields.name: FleetwideIntroMssg_0_0
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCTION & NON ADVICE STATEMENT

I will ask you some questions to narrow down the level of cover which meets your needs and then you can then decide whether or not the cover is right for you.


INTRODUCING ROADSIDE ASSISTANCE / FLEETWIDE

Our starting level cover Roadside Assistance provides you with assistance anywhere in the UK. If we can’t fix the vehicle on the roadside, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further.

fields.name: MINI_BUS_MSSG_API
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCING MINIBUS COVER

We only offer one package for Minibus cover which is our Minibus rescue package


ROADSIDE/HOMESTART/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will authorise a recovery . Once approved, we will provide Onward travel for the driver and up to 16 passengers. The replacement vehicle will be a minibus or midicoach with a driver, or a replacement vehicle from a supplier chosen by The AA.

Carry on luggage in the replacement vehicle is at the discretion of the AA.

fields.name: CurrentProvider_0
fields.fieldText: Current Provider: {!Current_provider}

fields.name: CurrentCost_0
fields.fieldText: Current Cost Annually: {!Current_cost}

fields.name: MIX_4_National_Recovery
fields.fieldText:
National Recovery (Relay);

If your vehicle can’t be fixed at the roadside, would you like to be taken to a single destination of your choice anywhere in the UK, rather than the nearest suitable repairer?

fields.name: MIX_4_CoverPLan_restVehicles
fields.fieldText: Coverage plan for the rest of the vehicles (FLEETWIDE)

fields.name: Fleetwide1Mssg_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Fleetwide 1.


ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

If your vehicle was off the road and you are unable to continue your journey, you can choose from a hire car for 48 hours, overnight accommodation or public transport costs to enable you to continue your journeys if your vehicle was off the road. The Hire vehicle is subject to the car hire company's terms which includes exclusions for endorsements.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable . A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable. A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

If your vehicle was off the road and you are unable to continue your journey, you can choose from a hire car for 48 hours, overnight accommodation or public transport costs to enable you to continue your journeys if your vehicle was off the road. fields.name: FleetwideIntroMssg_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCTION & NON ADVICE STATEMENT

I will ask you some questions to narrow down the level of cover which meets your needs and then you can then decide whether or not the cover is right for you.


INTRODUCING ROADSIDE ASSISTANCE / FLEETWIDE

Our starting level cover Roadside Assistance provides you with assistance anywhere in the UK. If we can’t fix the vehicle on the roadside, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further.

fields.name: MINI_BUS_MSSG_API_0
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCING MINIBUS COVER

We only offer one package for Minibus cover which is our Minibus rescue package


ROADSIDE/HOMESTART/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will authorise a recovery . Once approved, we will provide Onward travel for the driver and up to 16 passengers. The replacement vehicle will be a minibus or midicoach with a driver, or a replacement vehicle from a supplier chosen by The AA.

Carry on luggage in the replacement vehicle is at the discretion of the AA.

fields.name: MIX_4_RelayPlusChoice
fields.fieldText: If your vehicle can’t be fixed promptly, would you benefit from car hire, public transport or alternative accommodation?

fields.name: MIX_4_ProceedProductOrder
fields.fieldText: Do you want proceed with product order?

fields.name: MIX_4_coverPlan_specialist
fields.fieldText: Cover Plan Specialist: {!MIX_4_MiniBus_FLeetwide_GetOppRecord.Cover_Plan_1__c}

fields.name: MIX4_2
fields.fieldText: Onward Travel (Relay Plus): {!MIX_4_RelayPlusChoice}

fields.name: MIX4_3
fields.fieldText: Parts and Garage Cover (BRC): {!MIX_4_BCR_Choice}

fields.name: MIX_5_CoverPLan_restVehicles
fields.fieldText: Coverage plan for the rest of the vehicles (SPECIALIST)

fields.name: MIX_5_SpecialistCoverInformation
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCTION & NON ADVICE STATEMENT

I will ask you some questions to narrow down the level of cover which meets your needs and then you can then decide whether or not the cover is right for you.


INTRODUCING ROADSIDE ASSISTANCE

Our starting level cover Roadside Assistance provides you with assistance anywhere in the UK once your vehicle is ¼ mile away from your business address. If we can’t fix the vehicle on the roadside, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further.

fields.name: MINI_BUS_MSSG_API_0_0
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCING MINIBUS COVER

We only offer one package for Minibus cover which is our Minibus rescue package


ROADSIDE/HOMESTART/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will authorise a recovery . Once approved, we will provide Onward travel for the driver and up to 16 passengers. The replacement vehicle will be a minibus or midicoach with a driver, or a replacement vehicle from a supplier chosen by The AA.

Carry on luggage in the replacement vehicle is at the discretion of the AA.

fields.name: DisplayMessage_0
fields.fieldText: You can't just choose "Accident Management" and you can't choose the combination of "Homestart" and "Accident Management" without "Relay".

fields.name: MIX_5_ProceedProductOrder
fields.fieldText: Do you want proceed with product order?

fields.name: MIX_6_ProceedProductOrder
fields.fieldText: Do you want proceed with product order?

fields.name: MIX_7_ProceedProductOrder
fields.fieldText: Do you want proceed with product order?

fields.name: MIX_7_2_ProceedProductOrder
fields.fieldText: Do you want proceed with product order?

fields.name: MIX_5_Homestart_Choice
fields.fieldText: Would you like the policy to start at and within ¼ mile of your business address?

fields.name: MIx_5_RelaySpecialistChoiceRadio
fields.fieldText: If your vehicle can’t be fixed at the roadside, would you like to be taken to a single destination of your choice anywhere in the UK, rather than the nearest suitable repairer?

fields.name: MIX_5_AccidentManagement
fields.fieldText: In the event of an accident to any of your vehicles, would you like us to assist you in in the management of the accident claim?

fields.name: CurrentProvider_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Current Provider: {!Current_provider}

fields.name: CurrentCost_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Current Cost Annually: {!Current_cost}

fields.name: PFU_TRUCK_Summary_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Vehicles are under 3.5 tonnes Gross Vehicle Weight: {!PFU_TRUCK_API}

fields.name: Mix_5_CoverPlan1
fields.fieldText: Cover Plan MiniBus : MiniBus

fields.name: MIX_Number_vehicles_Minibus
fields.fieldText: Covered Vehicles: {!How_many_vehicles_have_more_than_8_seat}

fields.name: MIX_5_CoverPlanSpecialist
fields.fieldText: ﻿Cover Plan Specialist: {!MIX_5_MiniBus_Specialist_Get_Opportunity_Record.Cover_Plan_1__c}

fields.name: MIX_5_Number_vehicles_Spec
fields.fieldText: Covered Vehicles: {!How_many_specialist_vehicle}

fields.name: MIX_6_CoverPLan_restVehicles
fields.fieldText: Coverage plan for the rest of the vehicles (FLEETWIDE)

fields.name: MIX_7_CoverPLan_restVehicles_0
fields.fieldText: Cover Plan for the other vehicles (FLEETWIDE under 3.5 ton)

fields.name: MIX_6_SpecialistCoverInformation
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCTION & NON ADVICE STATEMENT

I will ask you some questions to narrow down the level of cover which meets your needs and then you can then decide whether or not the cover is right for you.


INTRODUCING ROADSIDE ASSISTANCE

Our starting level cover Roadside Assistance provides you with assistance anywhere in the UK once your vehicle is ¼ mile away from your business address. If we can’t fix the vehicle on the roadside, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further.

fields.name: MIX_6_Fleetwide1Mssg_1
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Fleetwide 1.


ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

If your vehicle was off the road and you are unable to continue your journey, you can choose from a hire car for 48 hours, overnight accommodation or public transport costs to enable you to continue your journeys if your vehicle was off the road. The Hire vehicle is subject to the car hire company's terms which includes exclusions for endorsements.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable . A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

fields.name: MIX_6_Fleetwide1Mssg_1_0
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Fleetwide 1.


ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

If your vehicle was off the road and you are unable to continue your journey, you can choose from a hire car for 48 hours, overnight accommodation or public transport costs to enable you to continue your journeys if your vehicle was off the road. The Hire vehicle is subject to the car hire company's terms which includes exclusions for endorsements.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable . A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

fields.name: MIX_6_Fleetwide1Mssg_1_0_0
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Fleetwide 1.


ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

If your vehicle was off the road and you are unable to continue your journey, you can choose from a hire car for 48 hours, overnight accommodation or public transport costs to enable you to continue your journeys if your vehicle was off the road. The Hire vehicle is subject to the car hire company's terms which includes exclusions for endorsements.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable . A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

fields.name: MIX_6_Fleetwide2Mssg_1
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Fleetwide 2


ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable. A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Fleetwide 2


ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable. A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. fields.name: MIX_6_FleetwideIntroMssg
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCTION & NON ADVICE STATEMENT

I will ask you some questions to narrow down the level of cover which meets your needs and then you can then decide whether or not the cover is right for you.


INTRODUCING ROADSIDE ASSISTANCE / FLEETWIDE

Our starting level cover Roadside Assistance provides you with assistance anywhere in the UK. If we can’t fix the vehicle on the roadside, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further.

fields.name: MIX_6_FleetwideIntroMssg_0
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCTION & NON ADVICE STATEMENT

I will ask you some questions to narrow down the level of cover which meets your needs and then you can then decide whether or not the cover is right for you.


INTRODUCING ROADSIDE ASSISTANCE / FLEETWIDE

Our starting level cover Roadside Assistance provides you with assistance anywhere in the UK. If we can’t fix the vehicle on the roadside, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further.

fields.name: MIX_6_DisplayMessage
fields.fieldText: You can't just choose "Accident Management" and you can't choose the combination of "Homestart" and "Accident Management" without "Relay".

fields.name: MIX_6_RelayPlusChoice
fields.fieldText: If your vehicle can’t be fixed promptly, would you benefit from car hire, public transport or alternative accommodation?

fields.name: MIX_6_Homestart_Choice
fields.fieldText: Would you like the policy to start at and within ¼ mile of your business address?

fields.name: MIX_6_RelaySpecialistChoiceRadio
fields.fieldText: If your vehicle can’t be fixed at the roadside, would you like to be taken to a single destination of your choice anywhere in the UK, rather than the nearest suitable repairer?

fields.name: MIX_6_AccidentManagement
fields.fieldText: In the event of an accident to any of your vehicles, would you like us to assist you in in the management of the accident claim?

fields.name: MIX_7_Homestart_Choice
fields.fieldText: Would you like the policy to start at and within ¼ mile of your business address?

fields.name: MIX_7_RelaySpecialistChoiceRadio
fields.fieldText: If your vehicle can’t be fixed at the roadside, would you like to be taken to a single destination of your choice anywhere in the UK, rather than the nearest suitable repairer?

fields.name: MIX_7_AccidentManagement
fields.fieldText: In the event of an accident to any of your vehicles, would you like us to assist you in in the management of the accident claim?

fields.name: MIX_6_BCR_Choice
fields.fieldText: If parts are needed after your breakdown would it be helpful to have a contribution of up to £500 towards the repair cost?

fields.name: MIX_6_EuropeanChoice
fields.fieldText: Do you take your vehicles into Europe?

fields.name: MIX_6_AccidentManagementAPI
fields.fieldText: In the event of an accident to any of your vehicles, would you like us to assist you in in the management of the accident claim?

fields.name: MIX_7_BCR_Choice
fields.fieldText: If parts are needed after your breakdown would it be helpful to have a contribution of up to £500 towards the repair cost?

fields.name: MIX_7_EuropeanChoice
fields.fieldText: Do you take your vehicles into Europe?

fields.name: MIX_7_AccidentManagementAPI
fields.fieldText: In the event of an accident to any of your vehicles, would you like us to assist you in in the management of the accident claim?

fields.name: MIX_7_1_BCR_Choice
fields.fieldText: If parts are needed after your breakdown would it be helpful to have a contribution of up to £500 towards the repair cost?

fields.name: MIX_7_1_EuropeanChoice
fields.fieldText: Do you take your vehicles into Europe?

fields.name: MIX_7_1_AccidentManagementAPI
fields.fieldText: In the event of an accident to any of your vehicles, would you like us to assist you in in the management of the accident claim?

fields.name: MIX_6_Specialist10Mssg
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Specialist 10


ROADSIDE


We will come out to you if your vehicle is more than ¼ mile away from the business address.address. If we can’t fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7

passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further

ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable . A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

INTRODUCING ROADSIDE ASSISTANCE

fields.name: MIX_6_FleetwideIntroMssg_0_0
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCTION & NON ADVICE STATEMENT

I will ask you some questions to narrow down the level of cover which meets your needs and then you can then decide whether or not the cover is right for you.


INTRODUCING ROADSIDE ASSISTANCE / FLEETWIDE

Our starting level cover Roadside Assistance provides you with assistance anywhere in the UK. If we can’t fix the vehicle on the roadside, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further.

fields.name: MINI_BUS_MSSG_API_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
INTRODUCING MINIBUS COVER

We only offer one package for Minibus cover which is our Minibus rescue package


ROADSIDE/HOMESTART/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will authorise a recovery . Once approved, we will provide Onward travel for the driver and up to 16 passengers. The replacement vehicle will be a minibus or midicoach with a driver, or a replacement vehicle from a supplier chosen by The AA.

Carry on luggage in the replacement vehicle is at the discretion of the AA.

fields.name: MIX_7_DisplayMessage_0
fields.fieldText: You can't just choose "Accident Management" and you can't choose the combination of "Homestart" and "Accident Management" without "Relay".

fields.name: MIX_7_RelayPlusChoice
fields.fieldText: If your vehicle can’t be fixed promptly, would you benefit from car hire, public transport or alternative accommodation?

fields.name: MIX_7_1_RelayPlusChoice
fields.fieldText: If your vehicle can’t be fixed promptly, would you benefit from car hire, public transport or alternative accommodation?

fields.name: ProceedProductOrder_MIX_3
fields.fieldText: Do you want proceed with product order?

fields.name: BCR_Choice
fields.fieldText: If parts are needed after your breakdown would it be helpful to have a contribution of up to £500 towards the repair cost?

fields.name: EuropeanChoice
fields.fieldText: Do you take your vehicles into Europe?

fields.name: AccidentManagementAPI
fields.fieldText: In the event of an accident to any of your vehicles, would you like us to assist you in in the management of the accident claim?

fields.name: Homestart_Choice
fields.fieldText: Would you like the policy to start at and within ¼ mile of your business address?

fields.name: RelaySpecialistChoiceRadio
fields.fieldText: If your vehicle can’t be fixed at the roadside, would you like to be taken to a single destination of your choice anywhere in the UK, rather than the nearest suitable repairer?

fields.name: AccidentManagement
fields.fieldText: In the event of an accident to any of your vehicles, would you like us to assist you in in the management of the accident claim?

fields.name: Specialist10Mssg
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Specialist 10


ROADSIDE


We will come out to you if your vehicle is more than ¼ mile away from the business address.address. If we can’t fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7

passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further

fields.name: Specialist10Mssg_0
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Specialist 10


ROADSIDE


We will come out to you if your vehicle is more than ¼ mile away from the business address.address. If we can’t fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7

passengers to a garage of the AA's choice or a local destination of your choice provided it’s no further

fields.name: Fleetwide1Mssg_0
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Specialist 2.


ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable . A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

fields.name: Fleetwide1Mssg_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Specialist 2.


ROADSIDE/AT HOME/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ONWARD TRAVEL

/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


If you break down anywhere in the UK and we cannot fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable . A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

fields.name: Specialist8Mssg
fields.fieldText:
So, from what you’ve told me, I’m going to talk to you about Specialist 8


ROADSIDE/NATIONAL RECOVERY/ACCIDENT MANAGEMENT


We will come out to you if your vehicle is more than ¼ mile away from the business address. If we can’t fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable . A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.

We will come out to you if your vehicle is more than ¼ mile away from the business address. If we can’t fix the problem, we will take; your driver, the vehicle and up to 7 passengers to a single UK destination of your choice.

Accident Management is an assistance service where our dedicated specialists will liaise with the Insurer's companies and repairers when the vehicle is involved in an accident, attempted theft or vandalised , whether the vehicle is immobilised or driveable . A courtesy vehicle is available for the period of repair when using our approved repairers. Following a non fault accident, Uninsured loss recovery to is also available and an additional charge is made for this service.
